question.title: Does anyone have an example repository that uses Cucumber/Gherkin with Allure Reports for Java/Groovy-based Gradle project?
question.body:
I have a simple CalculatorTest where I would like to generate test results in a folder when the test is run and then run Allure Serve on it to create the Allure report. I am not sure how to configure CucumberOptions in the TestRunner class and what I actually need for plugins, etc., in the build.gradle file.

I have the following groovy code and know the plugin is incorrect since the class is not found.

I would love to see an actual working example of how to configure the project that uses Allure 2. Currently, I am not sure I am headed down the correct path. Thanks so much. (Note: The test runs successfully in IntelliJ but the reports are not output to the build/allure-results folder. )

Here's my CalculatorTest.groovy file:

package TestRunner

import cucumber.api.CucumberOptions

import cucumber.api.junit.Cucumber;

import cucumber.api.CucumberOptions;
import org.junit.runner.RunWith;
@RunWith(Cucumber.class)
@CucumberOptions(monochrome = true,
        strict = true,
        plugin = ["pretty", "io.qameta.allure.cucumber2jvm.AllureCucumber2Jvm"],
        glue = ["Steps"],
        features = ["src/main/groovy/feature/calculator.feature"])

class CalculatorTest {

}

Here's the calculator.feature file:

Feature: Calculator

  Scenario: Adding two numbers
    Given I have a calculator
    When I add 1 and 2
    Then  I should get 3

Here is the sdCalculator.groovy file:

package Steps

this.metaClass.mixin(cucumber.api.groovy.Hooks)
this.metaClass.mixin(cucumber.api.groovy.EN)


    Calculator calculator
    Integer result

    Given(/I have a calculator/)
            { ->
                calculator = new Calculator();
            }

    When(/I add {int} and {int}/)
            { Integer a, Integer b ->
                result = calculator.add(a, b)
            }

    Then(/I should get {int}/) { Integer c ->
        assert(result).equals(c)
    }

And the Calculator class:

package Steps

public class Calculator {
    public Integer add(Integer a, Integer b){
        return a + b
    }
}

I have a config/cucumber.yml file that contains:

default: "--format pretty --format AllureCucumber::CucumberFormatter --out build/allure-results"

And an allure.properties that contains:

allure.results.directory=build/allure-results
allure.link.issue.pattern=https://example.org/browse/{}
allure.link.tms.pattern=https://example.org/browse/{}
